title: German Shish Kebabs with Fruit
description: A sweet and savory twist on traditional German shish kebabs, featuring fresh fruit and gooey sauce.

ingredients.name: Sweet skewers
ingredients.notes: Wooden skewers, soaked in water for 30 minutes

ingredients.name: Vegetables of choice (e.g. bell peppers, onions, mushrooms)

instructions: Thread vegetables and fruit onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush skewers with gooey sauce, then coat with a pinch of salt.
Grill skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until vegetables are tender.
Serve hot with a dollop of Greek yogurt and a sprinkle of dates.
Enjoy as a sweet and savory snack or dessert.
